description_long: This object is a large, straight-edged blade with a single edge and a pointed tip, resembling a machete or a heavy-duty utility knife. The blade is long, flat, and tapers to a sharp point, with a matte black or dark metallic finish. The handle is short, blocky, and appears to be made of a dark, possibly wooden or synthetic material, with a smooth, slightly glossy surface. There is no visible guard or crossguard separating the blade from the handle, giving it a utilitarian appearance. The overall design is simple and functional, with no visible ornamentation or decorative features. This type of blade is suitable for cutting, chopping, or slashing tasks in urban or outdoor environments.
description: A large, straight-edged, single-edged blade with a pointed tip and a simple, dark handle. The design is utilitarian and lacks ornamentation or a guard.
description_view_0: The object is seen edge-on, showing the thin profile of the blade and handle.
description_view_1: The full length of the blade is visible, highlighting its straight edge, pointed tip, and the blocky handle.
description_view_2: Another edge-on view, similar to view 0, emphasizing the slimness of the blade.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the blade is shown, mirroring view 1, with the same straight edge and pointed tip.
attribute_handle_design: blocky, straight, dark, smooth, possibly wood or synthetic
